scripts.build: npm run build -w @webops/shared && npm run build -w @webops/panel && npm run build -w @webops/daemon && npm run build -w @webops/web
scripts.check: npm run build -w @webops/shared && npm run typecheck -w @webops/panel && npm run typecheck -w @webops/daemon && npm run typecheck -w @webops/web
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @webops/shared && concurrently -n panel,daemon,web -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @webops/panel" "npm run dev -w @webops/daemon" "npm run dev -w @webops/web"
